dag-schema.guard: grep -q 'depends_on' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/db/schema.ts && grep -q 'waiting' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/db/schema.ts && python3 -c "import os; sqls=[f for f in os.listdir('packages/ai/agent-mcp/drizzle') if f.endswith('.sql')]; assert len(sqls)>=4, f'expected >=4 migrations, got {len(sqls)}'"
dag-schema.notes: Add depends_on (TEXT, JSON array nullable), on_upstream_failure (TEXT nullable, 'fail'|'skip'), inputs (TEXT, JSON blob nullable) to tasksTable. Add 'waiting' to the status enum. Run: cd packages/ai/agent-mcp && npx drizzle-kit generate. Current migration count is 3 (0000..0003); new one will be 0004_*.

dag-types.guard: grep -q 'waiting' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/validation/task.ts && grep -q 'dependsOn' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/validation/task.ts && npx --yes nx build agent-mcp 2>&1 | grep -q 'Successfully ran'
dag-types.notes: Add 'waiting' to taskStatusSchema. Add dependsOn, onUpstreamFailure, inputs to taskSchema. Add depends_on/on_upstream_failure to taskToolInputSchema (both session and ephemeral modes). Update TaskStore.create() to accept dependsOn/onUpstreamFailure and set initial status to 'waiting' when dependsOn.length > 0. Update TaskStore.read() and list() to include new fields.

dag-engine.guard: test -f packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/engine/dag-engine.ts && grep -q 'dispatchReady' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/engine/dag-engine.ts && grep -q 'cycle' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/engine/dag-engine.ts && npx --yes nx test agent-mcp 2>&1 | grep -qE 'passed'
dag-engine.notes: New DagEngine class: (a) validateNoCycle(taskId, dependsOn, db) — BFS/DFS check at creation time; (b) dispatchReady(completedTaskId, db, queue, taskStore) — scans tasks WHERE depends_on LIKE '%completedTaskId%' that are 'waiting', checks all deps resolved, dispatches. Wire dispatchReady into the task completion path in tools/task.ts (after taskStore.updateStatus 'completed'). Wire validateNoCycle into task creation in tools/task.ts before taskStore.create().

audit-foundation.notes: Checks schema columns, type schema additions, DagEngine existence, dispatchReady, cycle detection, and test suite.

code-review.notes: Human hold point. Reviewer checks schema, types, DagEngine, dispatch wiring, tests.

audit-final.notes: Runs all checks plus full build, test suite, and DoD coverage.

docs-and-publish.notes: Bump agent-mcp to 0.2.0. Bump agent-mcp-types if TaskStatus type gains 'waiting'. Document depends_on, on_upstream_failure, inputs in CLAUDE.md and README.
